answers: Veganism avoids all animal products — meat, dairy, eggs, honey. Based on ethics, environment, and health reasons.
Vegan protein: lentils, chickpeas, tofu, tempeh, seitan, nuts, seeds, quinoa, soy milk. Easily meet protein needs.
Why vegan: reduces animal suffering, lower carbon footprint, can improve heart health and reduce disease risk.
Vegan tip: supplement B12 (essential!), eat varied diet for complete nutrition, and learn to read food labels.
